title: DEVPACK Cubed
description: A small vanilla+ style modpack including the Vanilla Cubed mod. Improves the vanilla experience by adding new building blocks, gear and mobs!
body:
![logo](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/28957846/188499029-000bc2ef-fe9a-4f61-bfae-4eca2d413ab4.png)
 

DEVPACK Cubed aims to improve the core gameplay by adding new blocks, mobs and gear but still keeping the vanilla feel. New tools and armor, new enchantments and effects and lots of smaller things enhancing the core gameplay are added by [Vanilla Cubed](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-cubed). The exploration and environment are improved by [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic) and mods like [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and [Decorative Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-blocks) add new decoration and building blocks. [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) and various shaders make the game look and feel better.
